//: Dev proxy: forwards /api/v1/* from the Angular dev server (:4200) to the Spring Boot backend (:8081), avoiding browser CORS during local development. Active only with `npm start` / `ng serve`. To use it, point environment.development.ts apiUrl at the relative '/api/v1'. By default the app calls http://localhost:8081/api/v1 directly, so this proxy is optional.
